title: Responsive Accordion Challenge

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Accordion

Build a responsive accordion that can expand and collapse with a click of a button. The accordion should have multiple items, and each item should have a heading, description, and a button to toggle its visibility.

### Requirements

1. The accordion should be responsive and work well on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
2. Each accordion item should have a unique ID.
3. The heading of each accordion item should be a link to a page with more information.
4. The description of each accordion item should be hidden by default and only visible when the accordion item is expanded.
5. The accordion items should use a CSS animation to ease the expansion and collapse.
6. Add a close button to each accordion item so users can close it easily.
7. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
8. The accordion should work correctly with multiple accordion items.

constraints: Use only Tailwind CSS classes for styling

This is a sample accordion.

Heading of each accordion item should be a link to a page with more information.
Accordion items should have a close button so users can close it easily.
Accordion items should have unique IDs.
